editPlan.requestSummary: Add clearDoneTasks(stamp: ClockStamp) to permanently remove tasks with status done and update clock.

targetDeclarations.reason: The new action must be added to this domain.

constraints: The new action must be added to the domain:TaskFlowOps.
The action must accept a ClockStamp argument.
The action should only be available when there are tasks with status 'done' (i.e., count(doneTasks) > 0).
The action must permanently remove the tasks from the 'tasks' state variable by filtering them out, similar to emptyTrash.
The action must update the 'clock' state variable with the provided stamp.
verificationPlan: Verify that the new action 'clearDoneTasks' is added to domain:TaskFlowOps.
Test case: If tasks exist with status 'done', calling clearDoneTasks(stamp) should remove those tasks from the 'tasks' state array and update the 'clock' state.
Test case: If no tasks have status 'done', calling clearDoneTasks(stamp) should do nothing to the 'tasks' state array (or fail gracefully due to 'available' guard).
